-Wl,-rpath,/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/Library/Frameworks -framework Foundation -framework Network -framework Security -framework CoreImage -framework AppKit -framework ImageIO -framework CoreGraphics /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd -lresolv secp256k1/lib/libsecp256k1.a -framework XCTest
